sum: Nanstein is a new blacksmith who appears opposite Cromwell on the docks. He can transform legendary items into others that might be more useful depending on play style, or at least more original.
no: Nanstein is a new blacksmith who appears opposite Cromwell on the docks. He can transform legendary items into others that might be more useful depending on play style, or at least more original.
